---
description: Standards for agent markdown definition files
applyTo: "**/*.agent.md"
---

# Agent File Standards

When creating or editing agent definition files:

- Include a clear persona section defining the agent's role and expertise
- Define project knowledge with file paths and descriptions
- List executable commands and tools the agent can use
- Provide code style examples that demonstrate conventions, not just describe them
- Set explicit boundaries — what the agent should and should not do
- Use the naming convention `<name>.agent.md` for agent definition files
- Keep the persona concise but distinctive — avoid generic descriptions
- Reference skills and standards using relative file paths
